Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.tween.type

Class FlixelPropertyTween

java.lang.Object
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.tween.FlixelTween
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.tween.type.FlixelPropertyTween
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Pool.Poolable
public class FlixelPropertyTween extends FlixelTween
Tween type for animating values via getter/setter pairs (property goals) rather than reflection. Use this when you need setter side effects (e.g. bounds updates, listeners) to run on every interpolated step. Configure with FlixelTweenSettings.addGoal(java.lang.String, float).

This is faster than FlixelVarTween, which resolves names through Flixel.reflect each frame. Both can invoke JavaBean setters on every step when configured that way; prefer this type when you can close over getter/setter references and avoid reflection.

  • Constructor Details

    • FlixelPropertyTween

      public FlixelPropertyTween(FlixelTweenSettings settings)
      Constructs a new property tween with the given settings. Property goals must be added via FlixelTweenSettings.addGoal(java.lang.String, float) before starting.
      Parameters:
      settings - The settings that configure and determine how the tween should animate.

  • Method Details

    • setObject

      public FlixelPropertyTween setObject(@Nullable @Nullable Object tweenObject)
      Sets the object this tween logically animates (required before start()).

      This has to be set because isTweenOf(Object, String) needs to know the object to tween. This method is purely for logic purposes used by FlixelTweenManager, not for tweening purposes.

      Parameters:
      tweenObject - The object to tween.
      Returns:
      this for chaining.

    • setFieldLabel

      public FlixelPropertyTween setFieldLabel(@Nullable @Nullable String fieldLabel)
      Optional logical field name for isTweenOf(Object, String) matching.

      @Nullable public @Nullable Object getTweenObject()

    • start

      public FlixelTween start()
      Description copied from class: FlixelTween
      Starts this tween and resets every value to its initial state.
      Overrides:
      start in class FlixelTween

    • restart

      public void restart()
      Description copied from class: FlixelTween
      Restarts this tween from the beginning. Resets elapsed time and scale so the tween runs again from the start (or from current property values for property/var tweens when restarted manually).
      Overrides:
      restart in class FlixelTween

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Specified by:
      reset in interface com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Pool.Poolable
      Overrides:
      reset in class FlixelTween

    • isTweenOf

      public boolean isTweenOf(Object o, String field)
      Description copied from class: FlixelTween
      Whether this tween is considered to animate object for the given logical field or path. Used by FlixelTweenManager.cancelTweensOf(Object, String...) and related APIs.
      Overrides:
      isTweenOf in class FlixelTween
      Parameters:
      o - The instance to test (e.g. the root passed to cancelTweensOf).
      field - Optional goal key or dotted path (e.g. "x" or "weapon.rotation"); null or empty matches any field on object for types that support it.
      Returns:
      false by default; subclasses override.
